ModuleName: Control Flow and Python Data Structures

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured list of the key concepts and subjects covered in this module that learners and instructors can reference to understand the scope of the content.

Artifacts.Name: Quiz Question Bank (10 questions)
Artifacts.Description: A bank of ten quiz questions on control flow and Python data structures that instructors can draw from to assess learner comprehension and that learners use to test their knowledge.

Artifacts.Name: Problem-Solving Exercise: Structural Load Data Analyzer
Artifacts.Description: A hands-on coding assignment in which learners write a Python program to analyze structural load data, applying control flow logic and data structures to solve a realistic engineering problem.

Artifacts.Name: Drag-and-Drop Match
Artifacts.Description: An interactive drag-and-drop activity where learners match control flow concepts or Python data structures to their definitions or examples, reinforcing understanding through active recall.
